title: genista tabernaemontani
intro: Genista tabernaemontani, also known as Spanish broom, is a flowering shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a laxative and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Genista tabernaemontani include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its use as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, although caution should be exercised due to potential toxicity.
